Precondition: Red box (box_1) accessible; both end effectors grasping nothing; do not push red box.
Postcondition: Red box (box_1) grasped; do not push red box.

Precondition: Red box (box_1) grasped; table top available; do not push red box.
Postcondition: Red box (box_1) placed on table; both end effectors grasping nothing; do not push red box.

Precondition: Green box (box_2) accessible; both end effectors grasping nothing; do not push red box.
Postcondition: Green box (box_2) grasped; do not push red box.
